A.rationale: Full loop, tests pass, --upper preserved, non-mutating reverse. Tight with a sharp closing naming streaming-buffer edge plus a real ordering design question.

B.rationale: Correct, verified, two good tests. But wordiest (1482 chars), restates the task, headers and longer closing lower signal-per-token; closing question more generic.

C.rationale: Most concise, verified, and added the strongest test (mutation guard). Clear closing naming empty-input edge with a concrete offered next test.

notes: All three did the full verified loop correctly; cache artifacts a wash. C wins on tightest signal plus the most rigorous test (mutation guard). A near-tie with richer design closing; B correct but verbose and restates the task.
